records.question: What stadium in Sochi, Russia, opened in 2004, is named Fisht Olympic Stadium, and has a capacity of exactly 47659?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.opening_year = 2004 AND stadium.country = 'Russia' AND stadium.capacity = 47659 AND stadium.name = 'Fisht Olympic Stadium' AND stadium.city = 'Sochi'
records.pred_sql: SELECT stadium.ID FROM stadium WHERE Opening_year = 2004 AND Country = 'Russia' AND Capacity = 47659 AND name = 'Fisht Olympic Stadium' AND City = 'Sochi'

records.question: Which stadium is named Baku Olympic Stadium, located in Baku, Azerbaijan, opened in 2005 or later, has a capacity of at most 68000, and hosted the World Junior event in 2013?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.stadium_id
WHERE event.name = 'World Junior' AND stadium.capacity <= 68000 AND stadium.city = 'Baku' AND stadium.country = 'Azerbaijan' AND stadium.opening_year >= 2005 AND stadium.name = 'Baku Olympic Stadium' AND event.year = '2013'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.id
FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.Stadium_ID
WHERE stadium.Capacity <= 68000
  AND stadium.City = 'Baku'
  AND stadium.Country = 'Azerbaijan'
  AND stadium.Opening_year >= 2005
  AND stadium.name = 'Baku Olympic Stadium'
  AND event.Name = 'World Junior'
  AND event.Year = '2013'

records.question: Which stadiums in Saint Petersburg, Russia opened in 2005 with a capacity of at most 69501 have hosted the event where the name is World Master?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.stadium_id
WHERE event.name = 'World Master' AND stadium.opening_year = 2005 AND stadium.country = 'Russia' AND stadium.capacity <= 69501 AND stadium.city = 'Saint Petersburg'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.id
FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.Opening_year = 2005
  AND stadium.Country = 'Russia'
  AND stadium.Capacity <= 69501
  AND stadium.City = 'Saint Petersburg'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM event
    WHERE event.Stadium_ID = stadium.id
      AND event.Name = 'World Master'
  )

records.question: Which stadium named Nou Mestalla in Valencia, Spain, with a capacity of at least 75000 and opened in 2004 or later, hosted the FINA event in 2016?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.stadium_id
WHERE event.year = '2016' AND stadium.city = 'Valencia' AND event.name = 'FINA' AND stadium.country = 'Spain' AND stadium.opening_year >= 2004 AND stadium.name = 'Nou Mestalla' AND stadium.capacity >= 75000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.id
FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.city = 'Valencia'
  AND stadium.country = 'Spain'
  AND stadium.opening_year >= 2004
  AND stadium.name = 'Nou Mestalla'
  AND stadium.capacity >= 75000
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM event
    WHERE event.stadium_id = stadium.id
      AND event.year = '2016'
      AND event.name = 'FINA'
  )
